words.definition: a set of rules followed by a computer system
words.example: A recommendation algorithm can shape what users see online.

words.definition: to make a process operate automatically
words.example: Many firms automate repetitive tasks to save time.
The model was trained on a large multilingual dataset.
Developers must reduce bias in automated decision systems.

words.definition: to release a system for real use
words.example: The team will deploy the update after final testing.

words.definition: able to grow without losing performance
words.example: Startups need scalable infrastructure from the beginning.

words.definition: the state of keeping personal information protected
words.example: Users are increasingly concerned about data privacy.

words.definition: the point where a user interacts with a system
words.example: A clean interface reduces confusion for first-time users.
